sentences.target: Der Direktor kommt heute nicht ins Büro.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ diˈʁɛktoːɐ kɔmt ˈhɔʏtə nɪçt ɪns byˈʁoː/

translations.de: Der Direktor kommt heute nicht ins Büro.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ diˈʁɛktoːɐ kɔmt ˈhɔʏtə nɪçt ɪns byˈʁoː/
translations.en: The director isn't coming to the office today.
translations.es: El director no viene a la oficina hoy.
translations.fr: Le directeur ne vient pas au bureau aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Il direttore oggi non viene in ufficio.
translations.ru: Директор сегодня не придёт в офис.
translations.pt: O diretor não vem ao escritório hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay giám đốc không đến văn phòng.
translations.ar: المدير لن يأتي إلى المكتب اليوم.
translations.nl: De directeur komt vandaag niet naar kantoor.
translations.uk: Директор сьогодні не прийде до офісу.
translations.hu: Az igazgató ma nem jön be az irodába.
translations.pl: Dyrektor dziś nie przyjdzie do biura.
translations.el: Ο διευθυντής σήμερα δεν θα έρθει στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Direktøren kommer ikke på kontoret i dag.
translations.id: Direktur tidak datang ke kantor hari ini.
translations.sv: Direktören kommer inte till kontoret i dag.
translations.ro: Directorul nu vine la birou astăzi.
translations.da: Direktøren kommer ikke på kontoret i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は取締役は出社しません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; marks the subject.
Masculine common noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present tense.
Temporal adverb indicating time.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Contraction of the preposition ‘in’ + article ‘das’; expresses direction (takes accusative).
Neuter noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition ‘ins’.

sentences.target: Ich spreche morgen mit dem Direktor.

translations.de: Ich spreche morgen mit dem Direktor.
translations.en: I'm speaking with the director tomorrow.
translations.fr: Demain, je parle avec le directeur.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ nói chuyện với giám đốc.
translations.nl: Morgen praat ik met de directeur.
translations.hi: कल मैं निदेशक से बात करूँगा.
translations.el: Αύριο θα μιλήσω με τον διευθυντή.
translations.nb: I morgen snakker jeg med direktøren.
translations.id: Besok saya akan bicara dengan direktur.
translations.sv: I morgon pratar jag med direktören.
translations.da: I morgen taler jeg med direktøren.
translations.ja: 明日、取締役と話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present tense.
Temporal adverb indicating time.
Preposition that governs dative case.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; linked to the object of ‘mit’.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘mit’.

sentences.target: Der Direktor lobt die Klasse nach dem Projekt.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ diˈʁɛktoːɐ loːpt diː ˈklasə naːx deːm pʁoˈjɛkt/

translations.de: Der Direktor lobt die Klasse nach dem Projekt.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ diˈʁɛktoːɐ loːpt diː ˈklasə naːx deːm pʁoˈjɛkt/
translations.en: The director praises the class after the project.
translations.es: El director felicita a la clase después del proyecto.
translations.fr: Le directeur félicite la classe après le projet.
translations.it: Il preside fa i complimenti alla classe dopo il progetto.
translations.ko: 프로젝트가 끝난 뒤 교장선생님이 반을 칭찬합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 项目结束后，校长表扬了全班。
translations.yue: 項目做完之後，校長讚咗成班同學。
translations.pt: O diretor elogia a turma após o projeto.
translations.he: המנהל משבח את הכיתה אחרי הפרויקט.
translations.tr: Müdür proje bittikten sonra sınıfı övüyor.
translations.vi: Hiệu trưởng khen cả lớp sau khi dự án kết thúc.
translations.nl: De directeur prijst de klas na het project.
translations.hu: Az igazgató a projekt után megdicséri az osztályt.
translations.hi: प्रधानाचार्य परियोजना के बाद कक्षा की तारीफ़ करते हैं.
translations.el: Ο διευθυντής επαινεί την τάξη μετά το έργο.
translations.id: Kepala sekolah memuji kelas setelah proyek selesai.
translations.ja: 校長先生はプロジェクトの後でクラスをほめます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; marks the subject.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present tense.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; marks the direct object.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of ‘lobt’.
Preposition that governs dative case.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; linked to ‘Projekt’ as the complement of ‘nach’.
Neuter noun, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘nach’.

sentences.target: Unser Direktor fährt heute mit dem Zug.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzɐ diˈʁɛktoːɐ fɛːʁt ˈhɔʏtə mɪt deːm tsuːk/

translations.de: Unser Direktor fährt heute mit dem Zug.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzɐ diˈʁɛktoːɐ fɛːʁt ˈhɔʏtə mɪt deːm tsuːk/
translations.en: Our director is taking the train today.
translations.es: Hoy nuestro director va en tren.
translations.fr: Notre directeur prend le train aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi il nostro direttore prende il treno.
translations.yue: 我哋嘅總監今日坐火車。
translations.pt: Hoje o nosso diretor vai de comboio.
translations.vi: Giám đốc của chúng tôi hôm nay đi tàu.
translations.nl: Onze directeur neemt vandaag de trein.
translations.hi: आज हमारे निदेशक ट्रेन से जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ο διευθυντής μας σήμερα πάει με το τρένο.
translations.nb: Direktøren vår tar toget i dag.
translations.id: Direktur kami hari ini naik kereta.
translations.sv: Vår direktör åker tåg i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi directorul nostru merge cu trenul.
translations.da: Vores direktør tager toget i dag.
translations.ja: うちの取締役は今日は電車で行きます。
